titleStmt.title: SII 34.342: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 342. Nāṅgupaṭṭi (Maḍattukkōyil), Kulattur Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the north verandah of the first prākāra of the Maḍattukkōyil temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I, 17th year, Mithuna, sudi, Friday, 10, Svāti = A.D. 1267, July 1, Friday.

The nāṭṭār of Vaḍa-Kōṉāḍu gave some land at Pāttēri as tirunāmattukkāṇi of the temple of Tirupperumāṉāṇḍa-Nāyaṉār for festivals and repairs in the temple for the well-being of the king and the country.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOccaṭai paṉmarāṉa tiribhuvaṉac cakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tEvaṟku yāṇṭu patinEḻāvatu
midhuna nāyaṟṟu purvapakṣattu veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum daśamiyu peṟṟa cOtiṉāḷ Uṟattūṟ kūṟṟattu vaṭakOṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirupperumāṉāṇṭaṉāyaṉā
ṟkku Iṉṉāṭṭu nāṭṭavarōm pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu perumāḷ tirumēnikkum nāṭṭukkum naṉṟākat tiruvātirai tiruṉāḷ Eḻuntaruḷavum tiruppaṇikkum Iṉnā
yaṉāṟku Iṟaiyili tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyākak kuṭutta Iṉṉāṭṭup pāttēriyāṉa periya ṉāṭṭu nallūr kīḻaivayaluṅ kuḷamum mēlai va kuḷamum cantrādittavaṟ cella Iṟaiyili tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyākak ku
ṭuttōm vaṭakōṉāṭ tām Ippāttēriyil Uḷḷūr nāyaṉār cōṟuṭaiya cōḷiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tēvatānamu nīkka nīkki Uḷḷa nilamum puñce
yum Ūr nattamu
ṭuttōm §
Digital edition of SII 34.342 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
